title: tabernaemontana chrysocarpa var. costaricensis
intro: Tabernaemontana chrysocarpa var. costaricensis, commonly known as the Costa Rican yellow tabernaemontana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities, which are derived from its alkaloid-rich compounds. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana chrysocarpa var. costaricensis include its potential use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its possible anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
